meaning: adj.鐜荤拑璐ㄧ殑,鐜荤拑鐘剁殑
examples: The vitric tuff of Linli in Hunan may become a qualified synthetic material of zeolite molecular sieve after it is pretreated adequate1y.
Thus the preferential exploitation of the vitric tuff in high level is synthesis of zeolite molecular sieves and a series of products made from the synthetic zeolites.
